textByHash.04360ad32940a40e2b95187a94f40972cb37d92c: You say that now but the beasts in the mines are deadly, you'll have to be very careful in there.
textByHash.1ba16ad274f43b9b30221a2263eb411e8623cfa5: That's right. One of our dig teams has gone missing while searching for the temple. I need you to find out what happened to them.
textByHash.a7040e0960661dd8d67c74471c5eec5a1d1c70af: The guard has finally returned. Seems it took him so long because he had ten times more cut than we needed.
